summary: EQ-5D has been consistently used and validated in studies assessing quality of life in patients with acute coronary syndrome, especially when evaluated post-revascularization therapy. It effectively measures changes in symptoms, function, and daily activities through standardized reporting aligned with established outcome criteria like NYHA class improvement.
